title: Share pricing blindly trusts strategy-reported NAV, enabling deposit/withdraw mispricing if that view is manipulable
reason: Too speculative as stated. The vault does read `investedUnderlyingBalance()` for pricing, but this repository does not include any concrete strategy showing a permissionless or realistically exploitable way to manipulate that value. Without a manipulable strategy implementation, this is a generic trust assumption about governance-selected strategies rather than a standalone reportable vault bug.
